_comment: Copy the 'mcpServers' block into your Gemini CLI settings.json, Claude Desktop config, or Cursor MCP settings.
_instructions: 1. Start the MCP server inside Houdini: Toggle MCP Server in the Houdini Agent panel
2. Configure your AI client with the settings below
3. Optional: set HOUDINIMIND_MCP_TOKEN to the same value before launching Houdini and in this bridge config
4. Dangerous/confirmation tools are blocked over MCP unless Houdini is launched with HOUDINIMIND_MCP_ALLOW_DANGEROUS=1
5. The bridge connects via TCP to Houdini's internal server

gemini_cli_settings._note: Add this to your Gemini CLI settings.json (usually ~/.gemini/settings.json)

cursor_config._note: Add to Cursor Settings > MCP Servers
cursor_config.name: houdinimind
